hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if ! printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]&|;])git commit([[:space:]]|$)'; then exit 0; fi; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); fname=$(printf '%s' "$branch" | tr / -); expected="prd/branch commit updates/${fname}.md"; if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qxF "$expected"; then exit 0; else echo "Pre-commit hook: progress log is not staged. Per CLAUDE.md, prepend an entry to 'prd/branch commit updates/${fname}.md' and stage it before committing." >&2; exit 2; fi
